name: ChangeAccountDetails
description: Customer wants to update their personal or contact details on their account — such as name, email address, phone number, address, date of birth, or title. This does not cover password/login changes, payment method changes, or contract corrections.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to change my {changeDetailsType}
Can you update the {changeDetailsType} on my account?
My {changeDetailsType} is wrong — can you correct it?
Change my {changeDetailsType} and {changeDetailsType2} please
I need to update my {changeDetailsType} because I've recently married
The {changeDetailsType} on my account is spelled incorrectly
How do I amend my {changeDetailsType} ?
I've moved and need to update my {changeDetailsType}
My {changeDetailsType} has changed — please update it
Can I change the {changeDetailsType} associated with my account?

Update my {changeDetailsType}

My {changeDetailsType} was entered incorrectly when I signed up
